S. Bhuvaneshwari · D.Arch

01 — About

Crafting Spaces
with Purpose

A dedicated architectural professional with over 6 years of experience in interior designing and architectural drafting. Trained at Dr. Dharmambal Government Polytechnic College for Women, Chennai, I bring a disciplined eye for detail and a passion for transforming conceptual sketches into comprehensive working drawings.

My expertise spans from initial concept development to full production documentation — including sections, elevations, detail drawings, and complete construction sets. I have contributed to residential and commercial projects across Chennai, collaborating closely with clients and contractors to deliver spaces that are both functional and beautiful.

With proficiency in AutoCAD, SketchUp, Enscape, Lumion and Adobe Photoshop, I bridge the gap between hand-crafted design intent and digital precision.

03 — Experience

A Decade of
Design Practice

July 2023 — Present · 2+ Years
Senior Architectural Designer
Maya & Manoj Architects and Interior Designers · Perumakkam

Leading preparation of complete interior and architectural working drawing sets, coordinating design development from concept to construction documentation. Managing site visits and client consultations.

Nov 2019 — July 2023 · 3 Years 7 Months
Architectural Draughtsperson
Pronaos Designs and Interiors · Perumbakkam

Produced comprehensive working drawings including sections, elevations, detail drawings (doors, windows, gates, toilets, cupboards, staircases) and electrical layouts. Converted sketch designs into precise CAD documentation.

May 2019 — Oct 2019 · 6 Months
Intern — Architectural Drafting
Vedika Architects · Chennai

Supported architectural team in drafting residential project documentation and 3D visualisations using SketchUp and AutoCAD.

Nov 2017 — April 2018 · 6 Months
Internship — Government Architecture
Public Works Department · Chennai

Gained exposure to large-scale government infrastructure projects, site documentation practices, and public sector architectural standards.

05 — Services

What I
Deliver

01
Architectural Working Drawings

Complete production drawing sets — plans, sections, elevations, details — prepared to construction standard in AutoCAD.

02
Interior Design Documentation

Comprehensive interior layouts including furniture plans, decorating drawings, joinery details and finish schedules.

03
3D Visualisation & Rendering

Photorealistic renders and walkthroughs using SketchUp + Enscape / Lumion for client presentations and design approvals.

04
Site Survey & Documentation

On-site measurement surveys, existing condition drawings, and progress documentation for renovation and new-build projects.
